name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN Lewisville, Texas — EZPAWN is a national pawn shop chain offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, firearms services, and pre-owned brand-nam...
description_long:
EZPAWN is a national pawn shop chain with locations across the United States, including this Las Vegas store at 1501 E. Charleston Blvd. The company positions itself as a community-oriented pawn shop offering quick cash solutions through collateral-based loans alongside a retail resale operation. The Las Vegas location carries specialty inventory categories including firearms and auto loans in addition to standard pawn services.

EZPAWN's core offering is the pawn loan: customers bring in items of value — electronics, jewelry, gold, firearms, tools, gaming equipment, musical gear, handbags, or sneakers — receive a cash loan against them, and can redeem the items later by repaying the loan plus fees. Beyond lending, the store buys gold and diamond jewelry outright, with staff evaluating karat and weight for pricing. At select locations including this one, EZPAWN also loans against and purchases firearms, storing them securely on-site. The retail side sells pre-owned, brand-name merchandise at 25–70% off new retail prices, with new inventory arriving daily. An online shop is also available for remote browsing.

Several features distinguish EZPAWN from independent pawn shops. The EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and rewards digitally, make online payments on extensions and layaways, and earn points on eligible transactions — adding a loyalty layer uncommon in the pawn industry. An Instant Quote tool on their website allows customers to estimate what electronics are worth before walking in. Flexible purchase options include layaway (10% down, monthly payments) and a Take Today program through third-party financing partners offering up to 12 months to pay. Product and Jewelry VIP protection plans are also sold in-store.

EZPAWN is a functional option for consumers who need fast collateral-based cash or discounted merchandise, but it carries the same limitations as any pawn lender: loan fees, interest rates, and specific terms are not published online and must be reviewed in-store. The Take Today financing relies on third-party credit approval, and not all services are available at every location. Borrowers should confirm exact loan terms before committing, as pawn loan costs can be high relative to other short-term borrowing options.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program enables online management of pawns, layaways, payments, and earned points
Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value online before visiting
Pre-owned brand-name merchandise sold at 25–70% off new retail prices with daily new inventory
Firearms accepted for loans, outright purchase, and appraisal at this location
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and affordable monthly payments
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert in-store evaluation of karat and weight
Take Today third-party financing offers up to 12+ months to pay on purchased items
cons: Pawn loan fees, interest rates, and repayment terms are not disclosed on the website — must be confirmed in-store
Online payments for pawn extensions and layaways not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania
Services vary by location — firearms, auto loans, and other specialty categories not offered everywhere
Take Today payment option requires third-party credit approval and is not guaranteed
All retail items are pre-owned with no new merchandise available
best_for: People who need fast cash and have electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms to use as collateral
Bargain shoppers looking for discounted brand-name electronics, jewelry, and gear
Gun owners seeking short-term secured loans against legal firearms
Consumers selling gold or diamond jewelry who want an in-person expert evaluation
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for consumers who need immediate cash against physical assets or want deeply discounted pre-owned goods, and who are comfortable with in-person, collateral-based transactions. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs — fees and effective APR — are not published online and can be significantly higher than other short-term borrowing options, so borrowers must review all terms in-store before committing.
services: Pre-owned brand-name retail merchandise (25–70% off retail)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
EZ+ Rewards Program (points, online payments, pawn/layaway management)
Take Today third-party purchase financing (up to 12+ months)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and A/V equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amount, trade-up, stone replacement, cleaning)
